M1308_NSTG_DRSG_SOC_ROC M1308 Number of Unstageable Pressure Ulcers Non-Rmvble Dsg @ SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to non-removable dressing or

M1308_NSTG_CVRG_SOC_ROC M1308 Number of Unstageable Pressure Ulcers D/T Coverage Slough @ SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to coverage
